sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATE, amount DECIMAL(10, 2));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'Alice', DATE '2021-01-01', 100.00), (2, 'Bob', DATE 'NULL', NULL), (3, '', DATE '2023-01-15', 50.25);

SELECT id, name || ' account' AS user_info, created_at - INTERVAL (CASE WHEN amount IS NULL THEN 2 ELSE 1 END) DAY AS adjusted_date FROM test_table WHERE name || ' valid' IS NOT NULL AND created_at >= DATE '2020-01-01';
SELECT id, name, created_at - INTERVAL LENGTH(name) DAY AS date_adjusted FROM test_table WHERE (name IS NULL OR amount < 0) HAVING date_adjusted < DATE '2023-01-01';

SELECT DISTINCT name, created_at, amount - (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM test_table WHERE amount IS NOT NULL) AS amount_difference FROM test_table WHERE name || ' active' IS NOT NULL ORDER BY amount_difference DESC;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, name || ' joined' AS full_name FROM test_table WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO temp_table (id, full_name) SELECT id, 'Test ' || name FROM test_table WHERE id IS NOT NULL;

SELECT t1.id, t1.full_name, (t1.full_name || ' at adjusted date') AS adj_info FROM temp_table AS t1 JOIN test_table AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t2.created_at IS NOT NULL AND t1.full_name IS NOT NULL;

SELECT id, (name || ' active') AS status, (DATE '2023-01-01' - created_at - INTERVAL CASE WHEN amount IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DAY) AS duration FROM test_table WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL AND status IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE f_table AS SELECT id, created_at FROM test_table WHERE name = 'Alice' UNION SELECT id, DATE '2023-01-01' FROM test_table WHERE amount IS NULL;
SELECT t.id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM f_table WHERE f_table.id = t.id) AS f_count, t.name || ' in count' FROM test_table t WHERE f_count > 0 GROUP BY t.name, t.id ORDER BY f_count DESC;
